design_philosophy: Authoritative, clear, and professional. The design leverages a stark high-contrast Swiss style, optimizing for lead generation and conversion by breaking the form into a clean, single-column layout with aggressive white space. Focus is entirely on the user's data input and the resulting value.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Split-screen layout on desktop: Left side fixed with value proposition and imagery, right side scrolling with the multi-step form. On mobile: stacked with generous padding.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] hover:bg-[#00227A] text-white rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out border border-transparent shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:shadow-none hover:translate-x-[4px] hover:translate-y-[4px]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A0E17] border border-[#0A0E17] rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-white border-b-2 border-gray-200 border-x-0 border-t-0 rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-lg focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#002FA7] transition-colors placeholder:text-gray-400 w-full

labels.style: block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2

cards.style: bg-white border border-gray-200 p-8 md:p-12 shadow-sm rounded-none

images.description: Modern white office interior with large windows, used as a subtle background for the left side of the split screen.
Clean white abstract architecture, can be used for section transitions or placeholder graphics.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons use harsh neo-brutalist shadow mechanics (4px solid offset shadow that collapses on hover). Links get an underline expansion.
motion_and_interaction.page_load: Fade in and slide up (y: 20) with Framer Motion, staggered children for form fields.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: Inputs lose all standard outline rings and instead get a solid #002FA7 border-bottom.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use a split-screen design: Left side fixed with the hero image overlay and text (H1, Subtitle, Trust badges). Right side contains the form, scrolling vertically.

Implement the form using Shadcn UI elements but heavily stripped down to match the raw, Swiss/Brutalist style specified in 'components.inputs'. Use border-bottom only instead of full boxes if possible, or very sharp square borders with no radius (rounded-none).
Add 'data-testid' to all form inputs and the submit button.
The application should capture Name, Email, LinkedIn Headline, About Section, Skills, Certifications, Target Job Role, and Connections Count.
Simulate the AI generation and email sending step (show a modern loading state, maybe ASCII spinner or minimal text 'Analyzing Profile...').
Upon success, replace the form with a stark, high-contrast Success message with the generated plan snippet.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Ensure 'Bricolage Grotesque' is applied via Tailwind.
